instruction: 帮我把用户数据整理到报告文档里

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '月份'
ws['B1'] = 'DAU(万)'
ws['C1'] = 'MAU(万)'
ws['D1'] = '付费用户(万)'
ws['E1'] = 'ARPU(元)'
ws['A2'] = '2025-01'
ws['B2'] = 45.2
ws['C2'] = 180.5
ws['D2'] = 8.2
ws['E2'] = 35.6
ws['A3'] = '2025-02'
ws['B3'] = 48.9
ws['C3'] = 192.3
ws['D3'] = 9.1
ws['E3'] = 38.2
ws['A4'] = '2025-03'
ws['B4'] = 52.6
ws['C4'] = 205.8
ws['D4'] = 10.3
ws['E4'] = 41.5
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/user_metrics.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 帮我把用户数据整理到报告文档里
从/home/user/Desktop/user_metrics.xlsx中读取3月份的MAU和付费用户数，追加到/home/user/Desktop/user_report.txt末尾：'2025年3月数据：MAU 205.8万，付费用户10.3万'，保存
